form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 41-day let-up. Last start won by a neck at Scottsville March 1 over 1200m defeating Fortress Of Fire with 59kg at $6.50. The start before that 3rd in a small field at Scottsville on January 25 over 1100m, 4 len behind William Robertson carrying 59.5kg at $6. Capable of a strong showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 100m, steadied to avoid the heels of Connery.
Rolled out on the latter part of the turn.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd of 11 at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 1160m, 1.4 len behind Ziyasha with 52kg at $9. Before that 3rd in a small field at Turffontein Standside on February 21 over 1160m, 3.5 len behind Buffalo Storm Cody with 52kg at $13.50. Not far off the winner latest and looks a genuine hope.

previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 56-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 9 at Turffontein Standside on February 14 over 1160m, 1.5 len behind The Specialist carrying 58.6kg at $3.30. The start before that 4th of 13 at Turffontein Standside on January 11 over 1160m, 3.5 len behind Almond Sea with 50kg at $21. Speedy type ready to win. Nice effort last time so worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: As the start was effected, in turn was bumped in by Zoombomber.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation 13th of 15 at Kenilworth in the G1 Cape Guineas December 13 over 1600m, 10 len behind Jan Van Goyen with 60kg at $101. On debut to post a big 3.5 len win. Greyville All Weather June 4 over 1200m defeating Holy Star with 60kg at $2.80. Others are preferred.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 47-day let-up. First-up after three months 5th of 7 at Greyville All Weather on February 23 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Good Traveller carrying 60.5kg at $13.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 13 at Scottsville on December 8 2024 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Mar Del Plata carrying 60.5kg at $9.50. Needs more time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 150m, brushed out on two occasions by Thisiswhatitmeans.

form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Comes here off a 47-day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by 1.5 len at Greyville All Weather February 23 over 1200m defeating Thisiswhatitmeans with 61.5kg at $2.80. The start before that favourite; won by 1.4 len at Greyville All Weather February 6 over 1000m defeating Donquerari carrying 61.5kg at $3. This tougher but hard to knock recent form winning three on end. Has the ability to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Baulked for a clear run between the 150m and the 50m.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 47-day let-up. form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 9 at Scottsville in LR on March 15 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Okavango carrying 59kg at $7. The race before that won by 3 len at Greyville All Weather January 14 over 1400m defeating Jp's Palace carrying 61.5kg at $3.50. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out from the 300m. Approaching the 100m, brushed Stars In Heaven.
Shortly before the finish, rolled in marginally.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 42 day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by 2.5 len at Kenilworth G2 WPOTA Diadem Stakes February 28 over 1200m defeating O'tenikwa carrying 59kg at $4.30. Before that 2nd of 14 at Kenilworth in the G1 Queen's Plate on January 10 over 1600m, nose behind The Real Prince carrying 60kg at $51. Grade  2 winner latest as favourite with ease. Loves the trip and is the one to beat again.
